text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho—the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown—is finally here.

With the big three facing off, the racing world is
abuzz with speculation over who will win.

But in the shadow of all that commotion lies a
small bump in the road.

We're almost running out of time to enter the
venue, so I leave in a panic to search for her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Meow, meow! Good kitty! Look this way—strike a
pose! ♪

I find Seiun Sky in a park without a care in the
world, playing with a cat.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Pull out your camera and take a picture of me and
this cute kitty, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on, hurry up! No time to chitchat.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Cheese! Meooow!

Without knowing why, I take the picture of Sky
and the cat, and send it to her phone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nice. There it is... Aaand sent.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, we're good. Let's get going.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'd tell ya, but if we're late, they'll scratch me off
the race. Don't want that to happen, do we?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: C'mon, follow me! Run with everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We made it! What a relief. ♪ In fact, it looks like
we didn't have to rush after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh, sorry for making you nervous.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But that was nothing. I'm gonna make your heart
pound right outta your chest during the race. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what are you so scared for? I'm not gonna
do anything dumb.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's the first race in the Classics... That does mean
something, even for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My eyes are on the prize, and I'm not letting
anyone take it from me.

I might be panicking in this frenetic moment
before the race, but Sky is extremely calm.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You just take it easy, 'kay? I won't do anything
bad. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky, I heard you barely made it to the track on
time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, are you taking this seriously? Don't you
feel even an ounce of nerv—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, King.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're such a sweetheart, worryin' about lil' ol'
me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I don't need your concern. I know today's not
an ordinary race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Or I should say, I can't face this like normal.
Either way, let's both try hard, yeah?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: My... Even Sky is taking this seriously?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... All righty!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is my first real step toward becoming the top
Umamusume in Japan. I have to push harder than
ever and finish first!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is also solely focused on the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How delightful. Truly an attitude suited for the
big three. I'll turn this into first-rate fuel for
myself!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Gramps, I've finally made it. But, you know,
don't get your hopes up yet."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"So just you wait. I'm gonna come home with the
crown. ♪ Love, Sky ☆"
